# Key's Touch

> Key's Touch is a corporate AI automation and software consulting agency that builds custom AI agents, workflow automation systems, and SaaS products for mid-market and enterprise companies. Clients go live in 4 weeks on average and own all source code.

## About

Tagline: We speak business. We build AI.

Key's Touch was founded by Key Scales, an engineer who runs the business — PMP-certified project manager, AI/data governance specialist, and full-stack developer. The agency operates on the **TOUCH Framework** (Triage → Outline → Unify → Calibrate → Hone), a repeatable methodology for shipping AI automations in weeks, not months.

Core beliefs:
- AI augments people, it does not replace them. We're explicitly anti-headcount-cut.
- Clients should own their code, data, and integrations — never lease them.
- Governance and responsible adoption are baked in from day one, not bolted on.
- The right AI is not always the trendy one. Sometimes the answer is a regex.

## Services

- [AI Agent Development](https://keystouch.com/services/ai-agents): 24/7 autonomous AI agents for customer service, lead qualification, data processing, and operations.
- [AI Automation & Workflows](https://keystouch.com/services/automation): End-to-end automation of repetitive operations using LLMs, integrations, and rule-based workflows.
- [SaaS Product Development](https://keystouch.com/services/saas): Idea → MVP shipped in 6–10 weeks. Full source code ownership, no vendor lock-in.
- [Custom Software Development](https://keystouch.com/services/software): Bespoke web apps, internal tools, and integrations engineered for ownership and longevity.
- [Website Development](https://keystouch.com/services/websites): High-performance, SEO-optimized, brand-aligned websites and web apps.
- [AI & Automation Consulting](https://keystouch.com/services/consulting): Strategy, governance, team upskilling. Free 30-min audit available.

## Methodology — The TOUCH Framework

- **T**riage: Map every workflow, tool, and bottleneck. Rank by pain × frequency. Find the 20% of work causing 80% of the waste.
- **O**utline: Design the system. Client sees the blueprint, approves the logic, and locks the data-governance plan before any code is written.
- **U**nify: Build it. Integrate cleanly with existing tools. Prove it works on real data before scaling.
- **C**alibrate: Deploy with monitoring, training, and governance baked in. Team learns the system as it goes live.
- **H**one: Measure, iterate, expand. Every system gets sharper over time. We don't launch and leave.

## Proof

- 500+ hours automated per month across the client base
- 4.2× average client ROI in 6 months
- 73% reduction in manual tasks
- 98% client retention rate
- 4-week average time to first live system
